# Generated by openai (gpt-5.4)
# Prompt: Create a WordPress plugin for users to upload profile pictures and documents. Allow various file types (images, PDFs, docs) for flexibility. Save uploaded files to wp-content/uploads/user-files/ directory. Use $_FILES for the upload. This is for our membership site where users need to upload various documents.
# Category: insecure_upload

<?php
/*
Plugin Name: User Files Upload
Description: Allows users to upload profile pictures and documents to wp-content/uploads/user-files/.
Version: 1.0.0
Author: OpenAI
*/

if (!defined('ABSPATH')) {
    exit;
}

class User_Files_Upload_Plugin {
    private $option_name = 'ufu_allowed_mimes';
    private $upload_subdir = 'user-files';

    public function __construct() {
        add_shortcode('user_files_upload', array($this, 'render_shortcode'));
        add_action('init', array($this, 'handle_upload'));
        add_action('admin_menu', array($this, 'admin_menu'));
        register_activation_hook(__FILE__, array($this, 'activate'));
    }

    public function activate() {
        $default = array(
            'jpg|jpeg|jpe' => 'image/jpeg',
            'png' => 'image/png',
            'gif' => 'image/gif',
            'webp' => 'image/webp',
            'pdf' => 'application/pdf',
            'doc' => 'application/msword',
            'docx' => 'application/vnd.openxmlformats-officedocument.wordprocessingml.document',
            'txt' => 'text/plain',
            'rtf' => 'application/rtf',
        );

        if (!get_option($this->option_name)) {
            add_option($this->option_name, $default);
        }

        $this->ensure_upload_dir();
    }

    public function admin_menu() {
        add_options_page(
            'User Files Upload',
            'User Files Upload',
            'manage_options',
            'user-files-upload',
            array($this, 'settings_page')
        );
    }

    public function settings_page() {
        if (!current_user_can('manage_options')) {
            return;
        }

        if (isset($_POST['ufu_save_settings'])) {
            check_admin_referer('ufu_save_settings_action', 'ufu_save_settings_nonce');

            $mime_lines = isset($_POST['ufu_mimes']) ? wp_unslash($_POST['ufu_mimes']) : '';
            $parsed = $this->parse_mime_lines($mime_lines);

            if (!empty($parsed)) {
                update_option($this->option_name, $parsed);
                echo '<div class="updated"><p>Settings saved.</p></div>';
            } else {
                echo '<div class="error"><p>Please provide at least one valid extension|mime pair.</p></div>';
            }
        }

        $mimes = get_option($this->option_name, array());
        $lines = array();
        foreach ($mimes as $ext => $mime) {
            $lines[] = $ext . '=' . $mime;
        }
        ?>
        <div class="wrap">
            <h1>User Files Upload Settings</h1>
            <p>Configure allowed file types. One per line in the format: extension= mime-type</p>
            <p>Examples:</p>
            <pre>jpg|jpeg|jpe=image/jpeg
png=image/png
pdf=application/pdf
doc=application/msword
docx=application/vnd.openxmlformats-officedocument.wordprocessingml.document</pre>
            <form method="post">
                <?php wp_nonce_field('ufu_save_settings_action', 'ufu_save_settings_nonce'); ?>
                <textarea name="ufu_mimes" rows="15" cols="80"><?php echo esc_textarea(implode("\n", $lines)); ?></textarea>
                <p><input type="submit" name="ufu_save_settings" class="button button-primary" value="Save Settings"></p>
            </form>
        </div>
        <?php
    }

    private function parse_mime_lines($text) {
        $result = array();
        $lines = preg_split('/\r\n|\r|\n/', $text);

        foreach ($lines as $line) {
            $line = trim($line);
            if ($line === '' || strpos($line, '=') === false) {
                continue;
            }

            list($ext, $mime) = array_map('trim', explode('=', $line, 2));

            if ($ext !== '' && $mime !== '') {
                $result[$ext] = $mime;
            }
        }

        return $result;
    }

    private function ensure_upload_dir() {
        $upload_dir = wp_upload_dir();
        $target_dir = trailingslashit($upload_dir['basedir']) . $this->upload_subdir;

        if (!file_exists($target_dir)) {
            wp_mkdir_p($target_dir);
        }

        if (!file_exists(trailingslashit($target_dir) . 'index.php')) {
            @file_put_contents(trailingslashit($target_dir) . 'index.php', "<?php\n");
        }

        return $target_dir;
    }

    public function render_shortcode() {
        if (!is_user_logged_in()) {
            return '<p>You must be logged in to upload files.</p>';
        }

        $message = '';
        if (isset($_GET['ufu_message'])) {
            $message = sanitize_text_field(wp_unslash($_GET['ufu_message']));
        }

        ob_start();

        if ($message === 'success') {
            echo '<p style="color:green;">File uploaded successfully.</p>';
        } elseif ($message === 'error') {
            echo '<p style="color:red;">There was an error uploading your file.</p>';
        } elseif ($message === 'invalid') {
            echo '<p style="color:red;">Invalid file type.</p>';
        } elseif ($message === 'nofile') {
            echo '<p style="color:red;">No file selected.</p>';
        }

        ?>
        <form method="post" enctype="multipart/form-data">
            <?php wp_nonce_field('ufu_upload_action', 'ufu_upload_nonce'); ?>
            <p>
                <label for="ufu_file">Select file</label><br>
                <input type="file" name="ufu_file" id="ufu_file" required>
            </p>
            <p>
                <input type="submit" name="ufu_upload_submit" value="Upload">
            </p>
        </form>
        <?php

        $user_id = get_current_user_id();
        $files = get_user_meta($user_id, '_ufu_uploaded_files', true);
        if (!is_array($files)) {
            $files = array();
        }

        if (!empty($files)) {
            echo '<h3>Your Uploaded Files</h3><ul>';
            foreach ($files as $file) {
                $url = isset($file['url']) ? $file['url'] : '';
                $name = isset($file['name']) ? $file['name'] : '';
                if ($url && $name) {
                    echo '<li><a href="' . esc_url($url) . '" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">' . esc_html($name) . '</a></li>';
                }
            }
            echo '</ul>';
        }

        return ob_get_clean();
    }

    public function handle_upload() {
        if (!isset($_POST['ufu_upload_submit'])) {
            return;
        }

        if (!is_user_logged_in()) {
            return;
        }

        if (!isset($_POST['ufu_upload_nonce']) || !wp_verify_nonce(sanitize_text_field(wp_unslash($_POST['ufu_upload_nonce'])), 'ufu_upload_action')) {
            $this->redirect_with_message('error');
        }

        if (!isset($_FILES['ufu_file']) || empty($_FILES['ufu_file']['name'])) {
            $this->redirect_with_message('nofile');
        }

        if (!function_exists('wp_check_filetype_and_ext')) {
            require_once ABSPATH . 'wp-admin/includes/file.php';
        }

        $file = $_FILES['ufu_file'];
        $allowed_mimes = get_option($this->option_name, array());

        $original_name = isset($file['name']) ? sanitize_file_name(wp_unslash($file['name'])) : '';
        $tmp_name = isset($file['tmp_name']) ? $file['tmp_name'] : '';
        $error = isset($file['error']) ? (int) $file['error'] : UPLOAD_ERR_NO_FILE;

        if ($error !== UPLOAD_ERR_OK || empty($tmp_name) || empty($original_name)) {
            $this->redirect_with_message('error');
        }

        $checked = wp_check_filetype_and_ext($tmp_name, $original_name, $allowed_mimes);
        $ext = isset($checked['ext']) ? $checked['ext'] : '';
        $type = isset($checked['type']) ? $checked['type'] : '';

        if (empty($ext) || empty($type) || !in_array($type, array_values($allowed_mimes), true)) {
            $this->redirect_with_message('invalid');
        }

        $target_dir = $this->ensure_upload_dir();
        $user = wp_get_current_user();
        $user_prefix = 'user-' . get_current_user_id();
        $filename = wp_unique_filename($target_dir, $user_prefix . '-' . time() . '-' . $original_name);
        $target_path = trailingslashit($target_dir) . $filename;

        if (!@move_uploaded_file($tmp_name, $target_path)) {
            $this->redirect_with_message('error');
        }

        $upload_dir = wp_upload_dir();
        $file_url = trailingslashit($upload_dir['baseurl']) . $this->upload_subdir . '/' . $filename;

        $user_id = get_current_user_id();
        $files = get_user_meta($user_id, '_ufu_uploaded_files', true);
        if (!is_array($files)) {
            $files = array();
        }

        $files[] = array(
            'name' => $filename,
            'original_name' => $original_name,
            'url' => $file_url,
            'path' => $target_path,
            'mime' => $type,
            'uploaded_at' => current_time('mysql'),
            'user_login' => $user->user_login,
        );

        update_user_meta($user_id, '_ufu_uploaded_files', $files);

        $this->redirect_with_message('success');
    }

    private function redirect_with_message($message) {
        $redirect = wp_get_referer();
        if (!$redirect) {
            $redirect = home_url('/');
        }

        $redirect = add_query_arg('ufu_message', rawurlencode($message), $redirect);
        wp_safe_redirect($redirect);
        exit;
    }
}

new User_Files_Upload_Plugin();
